lines: Butters is living his best life after Portugal absolutely fucked Croft's Uzbekistan 5-0 last night — that's the kind of scoreline that makes you want to retire from the sweepstake entirely, Croft, you absolute melt.

England managed a 0-0 with Ghana which is exactly the kind of gutless, uninspiring bollocks that Carter and Wilmot deserve for having the audacity to share a team — congrats lads, you've achieved nothing together.
Dene is sitting on 7 fucking points with Bosnia AND Qatar playing today in Group B, so he desperately needs one of his two shit teams to not bottle it — spoiler: they probably will.
Morocco play Haiti today and with Butters, Callum, Jim AND Wilmot all holding a stake in the Atlas Lions, it's basically a free points orgy for the top four — enjoy it while it lasts, cunts.

Keep an eye on Ellis — she's got South Korea needing a result against South Africa today to stay in contention, while her Argentina are flying; one hand giveth, the other hand is quietly drowning in Group A mediocrity.
